item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Best Christmas news ever
item.description: I went for surgery recently to have a large cyst removed from my ovary. The right ovary and fallopian tubes were also taken and the doctor took samples from the uterine wall to biopsy as well. I wasn't super worried that it'd come back as bad news, but I was low-key worried. Doctor just called to tell me everything was benign. Happy Christmas to me.
item.dc:creator: AmoAmasAmant

item.description: She is one of my favorite cosplayers! Love her work! More here: https://www.instagram.com/aliya.will?igsh=enozb20xY2hsaHdt Have a great day on Imgur & Love from Japan!

item.dc:creator: TheWoodsAreVile

item.title: The facebook lie.
item.description: Can we just do this please? I don't want to see anything if it isn't posted by people I'm already friends with. That's it, that's all I want. It's that fucking simple. Hiding posts means you just put more shit on my feed to see what sticks. Nothing is ever going to stick. Even if I am interested, I'm reporting it on principle anyway because that's not what I'm on facebook for.
item.dc:creator: sascottsn

item.title: Red Cardinal Down!
item.description:
I heard a thump on the window to find this.
He hit the window
just a bit dazed
Feeling better.
After 27 minutes, full recovery.
item.dc:creator: IrvingSchwinglepuck

item.title: The Most Intriguing Headlines of 2024
item.description:
https://x.com/paulisci/status/1870912743001170355
January 4 https://www.theguardian.com/technology/2024/jan/04/chief-executive-of-collapsed-crypto-fund-hyperverse-does-not-appear-to-exist
January 8 https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/08/world/europe/tiny-mouse-shed-video.html (paywalled, but here’s the YouTube link: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_v5U8QJSRW8)
January 9 https://www.theglobeandmail.com/business/article-ontario-granted-taxpayer-funds-to-mining-exploration-companies-called/
January 15 https://www.economist.com/britain/2024/01/15/britain-has-seen-an-alarming-rise-in-poetry-sales January was a wacky month
February 2 https://www.cbsnews.com/news/pigeon-detained-on-suspicion-of-spying-india-released-after-eight-months-peta/
March 15 https://www.indiatoday.in/world/canada-news/story/leave-car-keys-convinient-place-toronto-police-york-regional-police-peel-police-2515223-2024-03-15
April 9 https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-13290501/French-spies-honeytrap-France-schemes-wives-know-affairs-MI6.html Guess nothing happened in May
June 18 https://news.sky.com/story/self-driving-cars-found-to-be-safer-except-at-dawn-dusk-or-when-turning-according-to-study-13155011 Guess July was fairly mundane as well
August 3 https://metro.co.uk/2024/08/03/pole-vaulters-olympic-dream-shattered-penis-21355235/
September 12 https://www.reuters.com/world/uk/britains-crime-minister-has-purse-stolen-meeting-police-officers-2024-09-12/
September 20 https://www.independent.co.uk/asia/china/panda-painted-dog-chinese-zoo-shanwei-b2617217.html
September 30 https://www.zmescience.com/ecology/animals-ecology/octopus-hunt-with-fish/
October 24 https://variety.com/2024/music/news/helen-mirren-kurt-cobain-gps-1236190259/
October 24 https://www.the-independent.com/news/uk/home-news/northern-aurora-lights-tomato-factory-ipswich-suffolk-b2635108.html
November 18 https://www.latintimes.com/feral-emus-named-thelma-louise-join-escaped-lab-monkeys-running-wild-across-south-carolina-566221
November 30 https://vancouversun.com/news/orcas-revive-dead-salmon-hat-trend
December 11 https://www.upi.com/Odd_News/2024/12/11/spain-Spanish-World-Scrabble-Championships-Spain-New-Zealand-man/7991733952675/
item.dc:creator: KalliJ
